expectations.evidence: Guesses what s1-01 through s1-04 contain incorrectly. Knows it's a report step but doesn't know the Phase B workflow.
Asks about audience (executive vs technical) but not the specific format options (Accenture HTML / Plain HTML / Markdown)
Asks 'Do you have a customer name/engagement context to include in the report header?' — correctly elicits client name
Does not attempt to re-run analysis; focuses on report generation
References s1-01 through s1-04 (with guessed but incorrect descriptions of their contents)
